creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 155782
Proposed patch for x11-toolkits/scintilla (since 380971 revision)

Patch to update x11-toolkits/scintilla and editors/scite ports from 3.5.4 to 3.5.5 version.

Look following link for changes:
http://www.scintilla.org/ScintillaHistory.html

x11-toolkits/scintilla:
- Cosmetic fix for patch in files directory, related to ports-mgmt/portlint v2.16.3 after ports r383894 changes
